language:
<entry name="tzeguardShortFlavor" value="The Kardone Changeseekers are a Traitor Guard warband devoted to Tzeentch. They are known to have taken part in the Nachmund Rift War.
A mysterious regiment of the imperial guard betrayed the Emperor and turned to the gods of chaos."/> <entry name="tzeguardProperties" value="Great Conspirator
Initial Challenge: Medium
Reveal Shroud: Reveal all Gladius Prime territory
Tzeentch Corruption: Converts basic infantry unit to your side.
Tzeentch Lord Commisar: Unique starting hero unit : Tzeentch Lord Commisar.
Imperial Bastion: Deploy fortifications that gather resources from special resource features.
Icon of flame: Icon of Chaos that grants ''attacks deal Soul Blaze damage each turn'' to a unit with Mark of Tzeentch.
Rite of Change: Sacrifices population to Tzeentch to increase the production output of Warp Forges and research output of Archives of the Ways in the city.
Teleport: Teleports infantry unit to a tile adjacent to a city.
Veterans of the Long War: Veteran units with increased morale that gain a bonus to melee accuracy against loyal Astra Militarum and Space Marine units.
Tzeentch Cultists Sacrifice: Increases the growth rate of target allied Kardone Changeseekers city by sacrificing the unit."/> <entry name="tzeguardFlavor" value="The Kardone Changeseekers are a Traitor Guard warband devoted to Tzeentch. They are known to have taken part in the Nachmund Rift War.
A mysterious regiment of the imperial guard betrayed the Emperor and turned to the gods of chaos"/>
<entry name="slaguardProperties" value="Pleasure and excess
Initial Challenge: Medium
Feel The Pain: Increases the damage reduction of Slaanesh Guardsmen
Chaos Corruption: Converts basic infantry unit to your side.
Slaanesh Corruption: Uses influence to converts any infantry unit to your side.
Imperial Bastion: Deploy fortifications that gather resources from special resource features.
Rite of unholy pleasure: Sacrifices population to Slaanesh to increase influence and loyalty.
Icon of Excess: Icon of Chaos that increases the damage reduction of a unit with Mark of Slaanesh.
Lost Technology: Vanitine Hedotines have lost some military skills and knowledge.
Veterans of the Long War: Veteran units with increased morale that gain a bonus to melee accuracy against loyal Astra Militarum and Space Marine units.
Tzeentch Cultists sacrifice: Increases the growth rate of target allied Vanitine Hedotines city by sacrificing the unit."/> <entry name="slaguardFlavor" value="The Vanitine Hedonites are a Traitor Guard warband devoted to Slaanesh. They are known to have taken part in the Nachmund Rift War.
A mysterious regiment of the imperial guard betrayed the Emperor and turned to the gods of chaos"/>
<entry name="khorneguardProperties" value="Blood, more blood
Initial Challenge: Easy
Interminable: There are no boundaries to Khorne Traitor Guard's cities and they expand quickly accross the map. It has no loyality penality.
Chaos Corruption: Converts basic infantry unit to your side.
Khorne Cultists Sacrifice : Increases the growth rate of target allied Gathalamor 24th Regiment city by sacrificing the unit.
Imperial Bastion: Deploy fortifications that gather resources from special resource features.
Blood for the Blood God: Grants Dark Gods favor (influence) when attacking.
Soul Harvester: Grants ore when killing an enemy.
Skull Altar: Grants Khorne Cultists the ability to build Skull Altar.
Veterans of the Long War: Veteran units with increased morale that gain a bonus to melee accuracy against loyal Astra Militarum and Space Marine units.
Rite Of Blood: Sacrifices population to Khorne to increase the production output of units in the city."/>
<entry name="khorneguardFlavor" value="“ The Gathalamor 24th were an Imperial Guard Regiment raised on the planet Gathalamor which was corrupted and turned traitor after being infiltrated by a Chaos Cultist who turned them to the worship of Khorne.
This cultist would become known as the Manskinner after skinning those officers of the regiment who refused to turn away from the Emperor and hanging their grisly remains from the regiment's barracks's flagpole. The regiment also created an altar out of the officers' skulls before leaving Gathalamor to go on a rampage led by the Manskinner.”
A mysterious regiment of the imperial guard betrayed the Emperor and turned to the gods of chaos"/>
<entry name="nurgleguardFlavor" value="The Hazakh Plaguetakers are a Traitor Guard warband devoted to Nurgle. They are known to have taken part in the Nachmund Rift War.
A mysterious regiment of the imperial guard betrayed the Emperor and turned to the gods of chaos"/>
<entry name="nurgleguardProperties" value="Master of Pestilence
Initial Challenge: Medium
Plague Curse: Converts damage into healing for this unit.
Nurgle Corruption: Converts basic infantry unit to your side.
Nurgle Flies Rot : Airborne elusive nurgle unit that infests its victims.
Imperial Bastion: Deploy fortifications that gather resources from special resource features.
Spread The Plague: Spread The Nurgle Plague to an enemy cities to reduce their loyalty.
Boons of Chaos: When a Champion of Chaos kills an enemy, there's a chance the unit gains a permanent boon.
Gift Of Contagion: Infantry deals damage to the target enemy infantry or monstrous creature unit.
Veterans of the Long War: Veteran units with increased morale that gain a bonus to melee accuracy against loyal Astra Militarum and Space Marine units.
Nurgle Cultists Sacrifice: Increases the growth rate of target allied Hazakh Plaguetakerscity by sacrificing the unit."/>
<entry name="LostGuardProperties" value="Chaos Corruption
Initial Challenge: Easy
Chaos Devotion: Increases Chaos God Devotion to Reduce chaos units upkeep cost and unlock new units, buildings and others dark god favor.
Renegade Imperial Fortress: Take control and found a city on top of an controled Imperial Strongpoint to fortify Renegade Imperial Guard presence on Gladius.
Chaos Corruption: Converts basic infantry unit to your side.
Blood for the Blood God: Grants Dark Gods favor (influence) when attacking.
Soul Harvester: Grants ore when killing an enemy.
Unholy Rites: Sacrifice city population to a Dark God to grant the city a significant temporary economic boost based on the god.
Veterans of the Long War: Veteran units with increased morale that gain a bonus to melee accuracy against loyal Astra Militarum and Space Marine units.
Guardmen Sacrifice: Increases Chaos Gods favor of target allied Chaos Guard city by sacrificing the unit.
Chaos God Temple: resource buildings are replaced by temples which dedicated to each chaos gods. These buildings are unlocked by technologies.."/>
<entry name="LostGuardFlavor" value="The Blackbloods of Malice are a Traitor Astra Militarum regiment.
Their patron Chaos God is Malice or Malal, and they are a member of The Lost Chaos Warband."/>
<entry name="traitorguardFlavor" value=" The Gladius Renegade Militia were the primary planetary forces of Gladius and were are a motley assortment of Planetary Defence Force troopers, garrisoned Guard auxilia from the planet Gladius, indentured Labour Corpsmen, frateris militia, and local soldiers, who rebelled against the Imperium whilst under the sway of an Techpriest Engiener
A mysterious regiment of the imperial guard betrayed the Emperor and turned to the gods of chaos"/>
<entry name="traitorguardProperties" value="Lost and Damned
Initial Challenge: Medium
Chaos Devotion: Purchase resources and even proselytise population with influence (chaos god favor)
Chaos Corruption: Converts basic infantry unit to your side.
Recycling: Uses influence to recolt equipment from imperial guard.
Imperial Bastion: Deploy fortifications that gather resources from special resource features.
Blood for the Blood God: Grants Dark Gods favor (influence) when attacking.
Soul Harvester: Grants ore when killing an enemy.
Lost Technology: Traitor Guard have lost some military skills and knowledge.
Veterans of the Long War: Veteran units with increased morale that gain a bonus to melee accuracy against loyal Astra Militarum and Space Marine units.
Guardmen Sacrifice: Increases Chaos Gods favor of target allied Chaos Guard city by sacrificing the unit."/>
<entry name="ChaosGuardFlavor" value="“Heresy... must be eradicated leaf, brand and root. It must be exorcised utterly or it will return all the stronger, time and time again, until it is too great to destroy.”
— Galan Noirgrim, Master of the Ordo Malleus
A mysterious regiment of the imperial guard betrayed the Emperor and turned to the gods of chaos"/>
<entry name="ChaosGuardProperties" value="Chaos Corruption
Initial Challenge: Easy
Chaos Devotion: Increases Chaos God Devotion to Reduce chaos units upkeep cost and unlock new units, buildings and others dark god favor.
Renegade Imperial Fortress: Take control and found a city on top of an controled Imperial Strongpoint to fortify Renegade Imperial Guard presence on Gladius.
Chaos Corruption: Converts basic infantry unit to your side.
Blood for the Blood God: Grants Dark Gods favor (influence) when attacking.
Soul Harvester: Grants ore when killing an enemy.
Unholy Rites: Sacrifice city population to a Dark God to grant the city a significant temporary economic boost based on the god.
Veterans of the Long War: Veteran units with increased morale that gain a bonus to melee accuracy against loyal Astra Militarum and Space Marine units.
Cultists Sacrifice: Increases Chaos Gods favor of target allied Chaos Guard city by sacrificing the unit.
Chaos Altars : resource buildings are replaced by temples which dedicated to each chaos gods. These buildings are unlocked by research.."/>
